source_policy.rule: Only values directly read from the DWG bytes/tool output may use direct_dwg_* provenance. Filename, template, visual, or domain assumptions must be needs_review; missing geometry/dimensions are blockers.

sha256.note: SHA-256 computed from the DWG file bytes.

signature.note: macOS file(1) signature read directly from the DWG file.

sha256.note: Companion PDF hash; not DWG geometry evidence.

signature.note: Companion PDF file signature; not DWG geometry evidence.

sha256.note: Companion PNG hash; not DWG geometry evidence.

signature.value: PNG image data, 3508 x 2481, 8-bit/color RGBA, non-interlaced
signature.note: Companion PNG file signature; not DWG geometry evidence.

pairing.note: DWG/PDF/PNG stems match on disk, but pairing semantics were not extracted from DWG metadata.

family.note: Family label comes from the sample filename only, not from DWG entity inspection.

display_name_ko.note: Korean family label comes from the sample filename only.

sample_stem.note: Sample stem is a filename observation, not direct DWG evidence.

blockers: LibreDWG command-line tools were not available in this environment.
ODA/Teigha file converter was not available in this environment.
ezdxf command/module was not available and cannot read native DWG without conversion.
No direct DWG geometry, layer, block, text, or dimension entities were extracted; those values must not be labeled as direct DWG evidence.

dimensions_mm.note: No width/height/depth dimensions were directly extracted from DWG entities.

door_count.note: Door count was not directly extracted from DWG entities.

hardware_options.note: Hardware/options were not directly extracted from DWG entities.

layer_names.note: Layer names were not directly extracted from DWG entities.

block_names.note: Block names were not directly extracted from DWG entities.
